creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sorry for taking some time to get back to this.

Horia Racoviceanu <horia@racoviceanu.com> writes:

> I haven't noticed a difference in how "f" renders.

Please see http://people.freebsd.org/~rakuco/fira-f-char.png for how
"fi" and "fl" render with the Fira shipped in x11-fonts (Konsole,
Qt-based, in the background, and Leafpad, GTK-based, in the foreground).
It doesn't happen in all applications, though -- Emacs and lxterminal
render those sequences just fine.
